title: 求使用 AI 从 0 到 1 开发一个完整 web 前后端项目的成功经验
content: A developer describes an unsuccessful attempt to build a complete web application using AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor). Their workflow involved creating PRD, plan, and frontend design documents sequentially, then implementing code. Despite extensive documentation, the result was merely a skeleton framework. The main pain point is maintenance: understanding AI-generated code for modifications requires deep engagement, creating tension between control and "vibe coding." They seek proven methodologies, tools, and workflow adjustments from experienced practitioners for AI-assisted full-stack development.
eventKey: 求使用-开发一个完整-web-前后端项目的成功经验
normalizedTitle: 求使用 ai 从 0 到 1 开发一个完整 web 前后端项目的成功经验

title: 奥特曼私人提款机曝光，OpenAI埋6650亿暗雷
content: WSJ and The Information exposed OpenAI CEO Sam Altman's hidden financial empire despite his zero-equity claims. Confidential IPO filings reveal $665 trillion in off-balance-sheet commitments for chips, energy, and data centers. Altman orchestrated a self-enrichment loop: 45% of Q1 expenses flowed to related parties, including Microsoft; 72% of revenue costs paid to investor-suppliers; and $488 million in stock swapped for compute. His personal investments in Cerebras, Retro Biosciences, and Helion surged in value after OpenAI partnerships. A $4.1 billion Helion stake exemplifies conflicts of interest. The House Oversight Committee and state attorneys general have opened investigations, demanding SEC scrutiny before IPO.
eventKey: 奥特曼私人提款机曝光-openai埋6650亿暗雷
normalizedTitle: 奥特曼私人提款机曝光 openai埋6650亿暗雷

title: 为什么大型人工智能实验室要招聘这么多哲学家
content: Major AI labs are increasingly hiring philosophers to help address complex ethical, safety, and alignment challenges. These thinkers contribute expertise on consciousness, moral reasoning, and decision-making as AI systems grow more powerful and autonomous. The trend reflects growing industry recognition that technical development alone cannot resolve fundamental questions about how AI should behave and what values it should embody.

title: What Happens to Design After AI?
content: John Maeda and Paul Bakaus discuss how AI is transforming design practice, exploring whether automation elevates baseline capabilities or expands creative possibilities. They examine software craftsmanship, taste, and creative judgment, noting that some design aspects will become automated while others gain value. The conversation covers agentic workflows, evolving user experience, designers' roles in AI-native environments, and how new tools will reshape relationships between designers, engineers, and software.
source: The a16z Show - content+a16zpodcast@a16z.com (Anish Acharya, John Maeda, Paul Bakaus)

title: 西方可以如何“偷师”中国，同时又保持自我
content: Western export controls on China will backfire unless allied democracies coordinate their policies. This requires unified action among allies; fragmented efforts risk self-harm rather than effectively countering Chinese industrial policy.

title: 如何在AI时代保护我们的隐私？
content: Current privacy laws fail because they shift data protection responsibility to individuals. Instead, businesses should be held accountable for safeguarding privacy in the AI era.

title: 新研究揭示欧洲可如何通过金融手段应对特朗普的攻击
content: A new study suggests Europe could leverage financial imbalances to counter potential U.S. pressure under a Trump administration. European investors hold $9.6 trillion in U.S. assets, while American investors hold only $6.4 trillion in European assets. This "asymmetry," if strategically utilized, could help level the playing field.

title: 2026 06 24 HackerNews
content: Steam Machine launched with randomized reservations to curb scalping, but prices rose due to component costs. Age verification laws were criticized as mass surveillance that fails to address the root cause of child harm: algorithmic tracking. Police abuse of Flock license plate systems highlighted warrantless surveillance risks. F3, a prototype open data format, embeds Wasm decoders for interoperability. Unsloth Studio enables local running of a 744B-parameter AI model with heavy quantization. Canada plans ten new nuclear reactors by 2040 with unclear funding. title: 企业微信「大圆」AI Agent 开启内测
content: WeChat Work begins internal testing of AI agent "Dayuan," an AI assistant integrated into workflow operations. Accessible via mobile swipe, it analyzes work data to generate contextual responses. Features include automatic service summaries, customer insights extraction, and AI-powered spreadsheets that convert unstructured communications into actionable customer profiles and analytics dashboards.
eventKey: 企业微信「大圆」ai-agent-开启内测
normalizedTitle: 企业微信「大圆」ai agent 开启内测

title: 曝追觅汽车 CEO 陈龙冬已离职
content: Chen Longdong, CEO of Dreame's automotive unit Xingchen Future, has left the company. Dreame's automotive operations have been folded into its industrial research institute, retaining only R&D functions with mass production plans now uncertain. The company launched its carmaking initiative in August 2025, targeting a 2027 premium EV launch. Dreame is restructuring to focus on four core areas—smart home, outdoor, smart mobility, and embodied AI—while canceling business units without actual operations.
eventKey: 曝追觅汽车-ceo-陈龙冬已离职
normalizedTitle: 曝追觅汽车 ceo 陈龙冬已离职

title: I automated my job (and it made me a better leader)
content: A senior director at GitHub describes building ~40 automations using the GitHub Copilot app to manage fragmented leadership work. The automations handle meeting preparation, daily triage, launch tracking, follow-up reminders, stale work alerts, and personal career documentation. As someone with AuDHD, she frames these tools primarily as accessibility aids that compensate for inconsistent executive function, making her leadership more reliable. She emphasizes that automations handle logistical scaffolding while she retains human connection work. She recommends starting with one high-friction area and refining through conversation with the agent.
eventKey: automated-job-made-better-leader
normalizedTitle: i automated my job and it made me a better leader
